tree.name: Jay Huff
tree.tradeDescription: IND traded a 2029 2nd round pick (POR own) and a 2031 2nd round pick swap rights to MEM for Jay Huff. MEM also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick via POR
assetsGivenUp.note: Portland's own 2nd round pick, acquired from PHI in Buddy Hield 3-team trade (Feb 8, 2024)
